summary:
I have found the issue and fixed it. 

The file `app/CsvReader.java` was hardcoded to read the CSV files using `ISO-8859-1` encoding instead of `UTF-8`, which corrupted the names of customers containing non-ASCII characters (e.g. `Renée Duböis`, `Hans Müller`). 

I fixed the issue by updating `app/CsvReader.java` to use `UTF-8` encoding. The `test.sh` script now successfully runs and passes with:

```
PASS: All customer names preserved correctly
```
